description_long: This object consists of three distinct potted plants, each in a different colored pot. The leftmost plant is a dense, round shrub with dark green leaves, housed in a tall, red rectangular pot. The central plant is a smaller, bushy specimen with lighter green, variegated leaves, set in a short, teal square pot. The rightmost plant is a tall, upright shrub with a conical shape and glossy, dark green foliage, planted in a deep blue square pot. The pots are simple and unadorned, with smooth surfaces and no visible decorative elements. The plants appear healthy and well-maintained, with full, vibrant foliage. This arrangement is suitable for placement in urban outdoor or semi-outdoor environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or building entrances.
description: A group of three healthy potted plants in red, teal, and blue pots, featuring a round shrub, a small variegated bush, and a tall conical shrub. The pots are plain and smooth, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall conical shrub behind the round shrub in red pot, with the central plant partially obscured.
description_view_1: Side view displaying all three plants clearly: round shrub (red pot), small variegated bush (teal pot), and tall shrub (blue pot) from left to right.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tall conical shrub in the blue pot, with soil visible at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing all three plants, with the tall shrub (blue pot) on the left, small bush (teal pot) in the center, and round shrub (red pot) on the right.
attribute_plant_species: shrub (possibly boxwood or privet), variegated bush (possibly Euonymus), upright shrub (possibly privet or holly)
